review_title: A System That Is The Best CRM for Ministries, Churches, and Fellowships
description: My overall experience with ChurchTrac is that I am so grateful that I was able to discover ChurchTrac I believe ten years ago. They have made so many positive updates and improvements to the system. ChurchTrac is our ministry's HUB for everything now and I highly recommend it to all ministries and fellowships.
author: Rose W.
pros: The price you pay for what ChurchTrac provides is the greatest. The give you more than you what you ask for and the customer support is the top. Over the years I have been able to switch from using several programs to now only one. The Ease of Use is great. It is not complicated to learn. The Reports have helped in preparing tax returns to seeing where the ministry is going. Even when it comes to Member Management, this has been an asset.
cons: The inability to have more than one way members can donate. It would be great if we could have in addition to Stripe that ChurchTrac uses, to add CashApp, PayPal and Venmo links for contributions.

description: Our overall experience with ChurchTrac has been great. They have provided more tools and support than we ever expected.
author: John S.
pros: Writing a 5-star review for ChurchTrac is easy. They do so many things well. What caught our attention initially was that is was developed for churches specifically. Our church started to look for just a replacement for our accounting software. The price for a ChurchTrac subscription that included the accounting software that we needed was less than most other accounting software on the market, but it offered more than just accounting software, it included a robust Church Management Software. The other main feature that attracted us to ChurchTrac is that it offers an amazing support network that includes the usual phone support but also webinars, YouTube Videos, online tutorials, and a complete online user guide. After viewing a few of their presentations, it became apparent that they do more than just software support. Much more. They provide ministry support to such an extent that you think that you have hired a consulting firm to help run your ministry smoothly, effectively, and efficiently, and then they throw in a healthy dose of encouragement besides.
cons: We have been transitioning to ChurchTrac for about a month now and have not had any negative experiences so far. There is a bit of a learning curve to overcome but not sure what else they could do to expedite the process.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Everything is taking too long to do. As a former programmer, I would suggest "user acceptance testing.
author: Mark N.
pros: I am happy with the accounting. I recently joined and stepped back to Dec 1, and have process though December and Jaunary Checking accout, and plan to do Credit Card and Brokerage Acct (to accept gifts of Stock)
cons: Not finding great value ChurchTrac youtube video. I have yet to be able to load Church Connect app, I really do not like the access to accounts and giving must go through the Connect app to configure for ACH
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great software for any church at a great price!
description: Overall, I've had a fabulous experience with ChurchTrac. As the pastor of a smaller church with many responsibilities, I appreciate a product that is easy to learn and use and doesn't cost a fortune. I'd strongly recommend this company and their products to any church looking for a way to keep track of people and projects, communicate with your congregation, and manage a functional and fresh web presence.
author: Aaron B.
pros: ChurchTrac provides an unmatched value for the cost of this product. In this segment there are many competitors, but you must pay double or triple what ChurchTrac charges for the same features. Additionally, ChurchTrac has the best support team I've ever worked with. In addition to numerous online help topics and a growing library of videos, support tickets are responded to almost immediately. I've been using this software for more than 5 years, and over time they have continued to update and improve the product. I keep getting a better solution and the price remains consistent.
cons: The setup with twilio integration was challenging and ultimately I wish I hadn't gone that route. There are still improvements to be made in this regard, and with the email campaign manager in general.

description: We have enjoyed using ChurchTrac for over 3 years and everyone on our staff likes the features, simplicity and when they release new features - they just work!
author: Larry H.
pros: Best Value for full ChMS. Only ChMS that includes basic accounting without using 3rd party software. Their Tech Support and Webinars really help.
cons: Reporting engine is very basic. There are times when a double-entry accounting could be useful. Very basic website tools.

review_title: Churchtrac - Affordable, Effective, and Backed by Outstanding Support
description: Implementing ChurchTrac has been a tremendous blessing for our church. It has simplified nearly every aspect of our operations while saving us about $600 per year in software costs. The transition was surprisingly smooth, and now we have a unified platform that not only manages our church more efficiently but also helps us better connect with and serve our congregation.
author: Michael R.
pros: ChurchTrac strikes a rare balance—it’s simple to use, yet incredibly powerful. It’s well-designed, full-featured, backed by outstanding support, and remarkably affordable. We originally chose it just to manage our membership roll, not realizing how much more it could do. Because of the low cost, we figured we’d try it for a year. Within just two weeks, we had fully transitioned our membership, accounting (from QuickBooks Online), giving, online donations, and even launched the Church Connect app. The support has been exceptional. I’ve submitted a lot of questions, and every response has been quick and genuinely helpful. The extensive YouTube library is another huge plus—not just for learning how to use the system, but for discovering new ways to leverage it in ministry.
cons: Honestly, my biggest frustration is that we didn’t find ChurchTrac sooner. For years, we relied on QuickBooks, spreadsheets for membership, and a website that was difficult to maintain. Looking back, we missed opportunities and added unnecessary complexity. If I had to note a functional drawback, QuickBooks Online does offer more robust and customizable reporting. That said, ChurchTrac’s reporting is still very solid for most church needs, and the tradeoffs in simplicity, integration, and cost more than make up for it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We tried other methods of record keeping, but they have not been as effective as Church Trac. We especially appreciate the accounting feature that allows us to print reports.
author: Wendy F. M.
pros: ChurchTrac is easy to navigate, with a clear menu system that makes updates simple and efficient. Its monthly pricing is reasonable and affordable for churches of many sizes. The platform also provides helpful training videos and responsive customer support, making it easy to get quick answers and resolve issues. The reporting and accounting features allow churches to track giving, events, attendance, and other important information in one place. In addition, ChurchTrac’s automated communication tools help keep the congregation informed and up to date on church activities.
cons: We would like it if Church Trac had a genuine app that can be accessed from phones or tablets. The current access is like pulling up a web browser.

description: Excellent and very attentive staff - the videos give great insight and nothing is hard. I found myself further in the process than I thought I would be, just in in the 30 day trial - so it was a no-brainer to sign up for the service. We are all excited about this cohesive software!
author: Ashley S.
pros: We are new users and love that ChurchTrac laid out how to get started, along with videos for details. I have put in a few tickets for questions and they respond so quickly.
cons: I want a step by step checklist in my life - after doing the first three steps, I'm wishing I had a "this is how most churches start" to help me go from soups to nuts.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: So Glad We Went with ChurchTrac!
description: What's not to love with ChurchTrac. In addition, we will be saving money in the long run. We will no longer need third party vendors to pushout notifications, and we can contact members by using texting and the Church Connect App.
author: Cheryl B.
pros: We just started using ChurchTrac with in the last 6 weeks. I absolutely love how user friendly the software is! The ease of the different modules and the support respond is excellent. I have created custom reports with very little help, because all you have to do is click on a step-by-step video!
cons: I really don't have any cons yet. We are still implementing the software. The one con is getting church trustees to make changes!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Support staff are great. I always get an answer to questions within 24 hours, even though I am in Australia. I have never felt alone in learning how each area works and the best way to utilize all functions of the software
author: Ian P.
pros: ChurchTrac has taken a large amount of paperwork from the Secretaries duties. Great tool for small churches who are require to keep the same records as large churches, and so easy to use for recording member attendance at all functions.
cons: I'm finding difficulty in recording visitors attendance at services. When a family drops in during a holiday trip, I don't need to have their details in the main data base
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Extremely perfect. So thankful we have church trac.
author: Elaine W.
pros: Carrie was extremely helpful, reassuring, kind, and easy to understand and work with. So patient!
cons: Church trac is amazing and so is the staff.

description: ChurchTrac was extremely useful for what we needed at the time. It helped organize and store our church members’ information and email birthday reminders to church staff.
author: Esther S.
pros: It is very easy to organize people’s information with ChurchTrac. There are powerful reports you can run and schedule automations. They also have excellent customer service!
cons: The system feels a little outdated and there’s no option for an app, just a web browser that’s optimized to be mobile friendly. Inputting information also was time consuming.

description: So far so good. Just trying to use existing spreadsheets to create accounts, funds and categories is my issue right now. It's the learning curve.
author: Jeffrey H.
pros: Just getting started as the new treasurer for our church. I've had a lot of questions and have opened a few support tickets. Each interaction has been very successful.
cons: Not a function where you can "practice" doing something new. Like trying a test of importing a checkregister from a dummy bank to see how it works. Don't want to add my bank account without trying it. Would be nice to have a hierarchy chart printable to view how my accounts relate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I could not be more pleased with our transition to using ChurchTrac. Support is first-rate. I've submitted suggestions - and always get positive feedback.
author: Bill C.
pros: Tons more features and less expensive than out previous software!
cons: The awesome people who work there. I get quick replies anytime I have a question. EVEN ON WEEKENDS!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The support Ii have received, through support tickets and calls, has been outstanding. I wish I would have reached out more and earlier in my Churctrac adventure.
author: Tod S.
pros: It seems easy and I think most people in our church will be able to use it for their assigned tasks.
cons: In the accounting side when you click on a drop down menu the boxes that open up are the same size and color scheme as the boxes in the window. If the drop down menu boxes where offset, and or a contrasting color it would help me find them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best software for churches at an inexpensive cost.
description: Positive, supportive, always trying to improve and looking for more ways to help churches and nonprofits.
author: Dianne G.
pros: It has everything we need for our church and so much more
cons: Nothing, it’s a great product. Maybe Offer more reports

review_title: Church Trac Works For Me It Will Work For You!
description: Church Trac is tailored to religious organizations and I love that. My overall experience has been positive and provided greater transparency for the financial recording.
author: Lincoln C.
pros: I like the easy and flawless operation of Church Trac. You need no previous knowledge it is very user friendly and they are always ready and willing to assist if you have problems. All of York calls are answered and the assistance is very professional.
cons: Not sure if this is a con but I would have preferred if the expenses not be listed as minuses but rather just appear in the statement as expenses since it is understood they are already expenses.

review_title: The Answer to a Ministry Assistant's Prayers!
description: I simply can't say enough great things about Church Trac. The customer service is fantastic, the ease of user use is so nice for someone that doesn't really have any coding experience - it's all very simple to use. And as upgrades come out they always make the system better.
author: Margie M.
pros: The ease in which I can do all the things my church needed. From people managements to accounting, worship scheduling, online giving, a church website, and attendence check-in. It's all included for a very low cost to the church. And the fact it is so user friendly in all modules!
cons: While there may be a few small items missing or I don't like, the developers are always doing upgrades to make the entire program better and if you submit ideas they really do take the time to look at that and see if that is possible.

review_title: Garden City Presbyterian, Garden City MI
description: I love it. Information at my fingertips. CT always available to develop new ways to use the application. Website formatting easy to use.
author: Carol M.
pros: I have used CT for many years now. I find the cost very reasonable, the support is very good - even when one asks a stupid question. I am the primary user and find it very easy to manage our membership, and our pledge giving. Reporting is easy to use and I, on many occasions, have been able to pull up information quickly when needed. We have never had any issues with online giving. I feel totally secure in having this information in the CT system. Unfortunately, we do not use the accounting platform.
cons: This issue is specifically on our end and not CT. I cannot get more people interested in using the online application for any aspect of CT. With an aging population, technology is not what they want. I need to find ways to show them how beneficial the information from CT can be for them. Always a goal.

description: Church Trac has served us well and will more than likely continue to serve us well. We have created financials and budgets within the software for many years at this point
author: Timothy V.
pros: The software is relatively easy to use. Almost anyone with a business back ground will understand the software. Initial set up is relatively intuitive.
cons: It would be nice if the reports format could be changed slightly. I would like to use fund as opposed to account from time to time.

description: We researched the product, and were very impressed with their video content on YouTube describing in bite-sized pieces how different aspects of the program work. We tried the 30 day trial and were very happy with how well supported the programs are with easy-to-find help videos and articles, as well as how responsive their support team is for more convoluted questions. After purchasing one of the packages, their team has continued to reach out to us with tips, suggestions, and even a free zoom call to make sure we are getting started on the right foot. So far it has been a stellar experience!!
author: Susan M.
pros: I love the way the way Churchtrac is set up for church use, everything from how families are grouped together for easy maintenance, to the way the accounting structure is set up, and how easy it is to get giving contributions and other reports run and distributed. We have just started to use the system and can't wait to try the other goodies that we know are available!
cons: Some of the entry screens are a bit clunky, and the fly-out menus on the left keep flying into the way of what I'm doing. But those are small things compared to how good the program is.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great app for church leaders at a great price
description: Overall, ChurchTrac is a great app for church leaders and administrators to track their churches impact in their neighborhoods, membership growth, and other church member milestones.
author: Frankie S.
pros: I have used ChurchTrac in the past to track the members and work of a church I assisted, it was helpful for those of us consulting and the leaders involved. The user access, security, communication, and bank transactions features along with the ability to run reports that help make data easy to read add up to an application that is a great value for money and useful for both users and administrators
cons: some have told me they had issues withthe sotware, I however love the application and could not find any issues that were dealbreakers for me.

description: Great for my job at the church. It was easy to get started. My Pastor uses other parts of the program. As we grow I'm sure it will be even more useful.
author: Georgianna M.
pros: As the Church treasurer with no formal accounting training, the best thing about ChurchTrac is the almost instantaneous answer to any questions I have. Thanks, ChurchTrac.
cons: I have not learned how to set up my own forms. I'm sure there is website that could instruct me. I will look it up for the future.

review_title: Churchtrac Support along with Father God saved our finances!!
description: ChurchTrac and the Support Team have been near life saving for me and my church. They were there for me in an amazing way when our finances where almost over taken by disgruntled members in our church.
author: Marilyn P.
pros: How easy it is to record deposits, have records of tithe & donations for individuals, inputting payouts of checks and debit cards. Help screen is wonderful for self-help. Can's say enough about ChruchTrac Support Team! They are amazing and prompt getting back with solutions if I have problems.
cons: Reports are wonderful but the Balance Sheet along with Funds is very difficult to understand.

description: Most phone calls have been Excellent & don’t feel worried about future service
author: Pearl W.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] provided great Support today with his help with our twilio accouny
cons: I did not have any problems that chris wasn’t able to help with
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
